lore.summary: An interstellar star nation consisting of the Manticore System plus all or part of the systems reachable through the Manticore Wormhole Junction. A single-system nation for most of its history, it began annexing systems from the 19th Century PD onward — chiefly to control Junction termini — and in 1921 PD merged with the Talbott Quadrant to form the Star Empire of Manticore.

territory.note: As of 1922 PD the Star Kingdom comprised 7 star systems plus protectorates. Each entry references a star_system file by 'system_id'. Systems other than Manticore are not yet built; the ids are placeholders to be filled as those system files are created.

member_systems.name: Trevor's Star System
member_systems.notes: Annexed by act of Parliament; Haven ceded all claims in the 1922 PD peace treaty. Associated with the Trevor's Star Terminus of the Junction.

wormhole_termini_systems.notes: Under Gregor System Defense Command, RMN; space station present.
Terminus sovereignty held, but world (Beowulf) not annexed; transit fees and defense costs shared with the host system.
Terminus sovereignty held without a claimed world; arrangements shared with host system.

naval_stations.name: Hancock Station
naval_stations.notes: RMN naval base in the otherwise uninhabited Hancock System. A key 'visitable place' — when the Hancock System file is built, Hancock Station becomes a place/station within it. Listed here at the nation layer because the system itself has no member world.

protectorates.subject: 17 worlds of the Talbott Cluster
protectorates.notes: Later united as the Talbott Quadrant within the Star Empire of Manticore.

protectorates.subject: part of the former Silesian Confederacy
